# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingressgateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use Istio default gateway implementation
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"

  - port:
     number: 443
     name: https
     protocol: HTTPS
   hosts:
     - "*.example.com"

   tls:
     mode: SIMPLE # set TLS mode to simple, disable cert generation by Istio.
{{<</ text >}}

### Sample Code for Envoy Configuration {#istio-filter}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: backend1
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "backend1"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/ingressgateway
  http: # set up HTTP configuration here for the following routes and filters
  - match:
      - uri:
          prefix: "/api/"  # filter for requests having "/api" as a path prefix.
    route:
      - destination:
          host: backend1
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: backend2
  namespace: default
spec: # set up HTTP configuration here for the following routes and filters
  hosts:
    - "backend2"  # filter for requests having "/api" as a path prefix.
  gateways:
    - istio-system/ingressgateway
  http:
  - match:
     - uri:
         exact: /api2
    route:
      - destination:
          host: backend1
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend1-dr # set up for "backend" services here with the following DNS resolution policy for the backends and virtual services.
  namespace: default
spec:
  hostAliases:
    - ip: "127.0.0.15"
      hosts:
        - "backend1"  # map hostnames to IPs of "backend1" here.

  resolution: CNAME # set to CNAME here for DNS resolution policy.
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: backend-entries-dr
  namespace: default
spec:  # use the following configurations for ingress routing on virtual services to backends using DNS resolution policy "CNAME".
  hosts:
    - "backend2" 
  addresses: [
      "192.0.2.4", 
      "fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b"  # map IPs to hostnames here.
    ]
  ports:
    - number: 90
      name: "http" # add port configurations for "90" and "http".
      protocol: http 
  resolution_config: "CNAME" # set DNS resoultion config to CNAME on port level.
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: virtual-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:  # enable HTTP filter for "ingressgateway" to access ingress service on port level and map the incoming requests based on the following rules.
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/istio-egressgateway # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
  http:  # set up HTTP filters for ingress gateways to handle virtual services at ingress gateways' service endpoints.
  - route:
      - destination:
          host: default.svc.cluster.local 
        port: 
          number: 80
        weight: 100
    filter_chains:
    - filters: # add filter configurations here as per the following list
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager # map to "filter chain" here for HTTP filter name
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.TypedStruct
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingressgateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec: # enable virtual services for "ingressgateway" to handle virtual services at ingress gateways' service endpoints with HTTP filters as per the following list and map the incoming requests based on the virtual service rules.
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway  # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
  servers:
      - port:
          number: 80 # set ingress gateway port level for "http" and "80".
          name: http 
          protocol: HTTP
      - port:
          number: 443 # set ingress gateway port level for "https" and "443".
          name: https 
          protocol: HTTPS
       tls:
         mode: SIMPLE
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
  kind: DestinationRule
  metadata:
    name: ingressgateway-dr # set up for "ingressgateways" service here with the following DNS resolution policy and virtual services for ingress gateway endpoints.
  spec: 
    hostAliases:
      - ip: 127.0.0.53
        hosts:
          - "." 
    resolution: CNAME
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: ingressgateway-entries-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec: # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list. 
  hosts:
    - "." 
    - "ingressgateway" # map ingress gateway host names to IP addresses of "ingressgateway".
  addresses: [
      "127.0.0.53", 
      "::ffff:127.0.0.53"
    ]
  ports:
    - number: 8080
      name: http 
    - number: 443 # add port configurations for port level "http" and "443". 
      protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: ServiceEntry
    metadata:
     name: ingressgateway-serviceentry
      namespace: istio-system
    spec: # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list. 
      hosts:
        - "ingressgateway"
      addresses: [
          "127.0.0.53", 
          "::ffff:127.0.0.53"
        ]
      ports:
        - number: 8080 # add port configurations for port level "http".
          name: http 
        - number: 443 # set up port configurations for port level "https" with the following configurations. 
          name: https 

{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: Gateway
    metadata:
      name: egressgateway
      namespace: istio-system # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
    spec: 
      selector:
        istio: ingressgateway  
      servers:
      - port:
          number: 80 
        name: http 
        protocol: HTTP
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
     kind: VirtualService
     metadata:
       name: egress-gateway # set up virtual services to handle ingress gateways' endpoints at ingress gateways' service endpoints with filters as per the following list and map incoming requests based on the virtual service rules.
       namespace: istio-system 
     spec: 
       hosts:
         - "ingressgateway" 
       http:  # set up HTTP configuration here for the following routes and filters
       - match:
           port:
             number: 80 
         route: 
           - destination:
               host: egressgateway2 

{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: ServiceEntry
    metadata:
      name: egressgateway-entries-dr 
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list. 
      hosts:
        - "egressgateway2" 
     addresses: [
         "198.51.100.4", 
         "::ffff:fc00:db20:35b:7399::5" # map egress gateway hostnames to IPs of egress gateway endpoints
       ]
     ports: 
       - number: 80
         name: http
      - number: 443 
        protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: VirtualService
    metadata:

       namespace: istio-system
     spec:

        hosts:
          - "."
     resolution: CNAME

    kind: ServiceEntry
     metadata:
      name: egressgateway-entries-dr # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list.
       namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hosts:
       - "." 
       - "egressgateway"
     addresses: [
         "198.51.100.4", 
         "::ffff:fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b" # map ingress gateway hostnames to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints
       ]
     ports: 
       - number: 80
         name: http 
      - number: 443 
        protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: Gateway
    metadata:
      name: istio-egressgateway # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     selector:
       istio: ingressgateway  
     servers:
     - port:
         number: 80 
        name: http 
       protocol: HTTP
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
      kind: VirtualService
        metadata:
          name: virtual-egress # set up virtual services to handle ingress gateways' endpoints at ingress gateways' service endpoints with filters as per the following list and map incoming requests based on the virtual service rules.
         namespace: istio-system 
       spec: 
        hosts:
          - "ingressgateway" 
        http:  # set up HTTP configuration here for the following routes and filters
        - match:
           port:
             number: 80 
          route: 
            - destination:
                host: egressgateway2 

{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: DestinationRule
     metadata:
       name: egressgateway-dr # set up for "egressgateways" service here with the following DNS resolution policy and virtual services for ingress gateway endpoints. 
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hostAliases:
      - ip: 8.8.8.8 
        hosts:
          - "."
     resolution: CNAME
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: ServiceEntry
     metadata:
       name: egressgateway-entries-dr # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list.
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hosts:
       - "." 
       - "egressgateway"
     addresses: [
         "198.51.100.4", 
         "::ffff:fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b" # map ingress gateway hostnames to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints
       ]
     ports: 
       - number: 80
         name: http
      - number: 443 
        protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
      kind: ServiceEntry
    metadata:
     name: egressgateway-serviceentry 
     namespace: istio-system 
    spec: # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list. 
      hosts:
        - "egressgateway"
      addresses: [
          "198.51.100.4", 
          "::ffff:fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b" # map egress gateway hostnames to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints
        ]
     ports: 
        - number: 80
         name: http 
      - number: 443 
         protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
      kind: Gateway
    metadata:
        name: istio-egressgateway # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
        namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
      selector:
       istio: ingressgateway  
      servers:
      - port:
          number: 80 
         name: http
         protocol: HTTP
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: ServiceEntry
     metadata:
      name: egressgateway-entries-dr # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list.
       namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hosts:
       - "." 
       - "egressgateway"
     addresses: [
         "198.51.100.4", 
         "::ffff:fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b" # map ingress gateway hostnames to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints
       ]
     ports: 
       - number: 80
         name: http 
      - number: 443 
        protocol: https
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: Gateway
    metadata:
      name: istio-egressgateway # set ingress gateway here as a route match rule here 
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     selector:
       istio: ingressgateway  
     servers:
     - port:
         number: 80 
        name: http 
       protocol: HTTP

 {{< text yaml >}}
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
      kind: VirtualService
        metadata:
          name: virtual-egress # set up virtual services to handle ingress gateways' endpoints at ingress gateways' service endpoints with filters as per the following list and map incoming requests based on the virtual service rules.
         namespace: istio-system 
       spec: 
        hosts:
          - "ingressgateway" 
        http:  # set up HTTP configuration here for the following routes and filters
        - match:
           port:
             number: 80 
          route: 
            - destination:
                host: egressgateway2 

{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: DestinationRule
     metadata:
       name: egressgateway-dr # set up for "egressgateways" service here with the following DNS resolution policy and virtual services for ingress gateway endpoints. 
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hostAliases:
      - ip: 8.8.8.8 
        hosts:
          - "."
     resolution: CNAME
{{<</ text >}}

 {{< text yaml >}}
   apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: ServiceEntry
     metadata:
       name: egressgateway-entries-dr # set up for DNS resolution policy on virtual services to backends with the following configurations and map hosts to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints here as per the list.
      namespace: istio-system 
    spec: 
     hosts:
       - "." 
       - "egressgateway"
     addresses: [
         "198.51.100.4", 
         "::ffff:fd00:c2b6:b24b:be67:2827:688d:e6a1:6a3b" # map ingress gateway hostnames to IPs of ingress gateway endpoints
       ]
     ports: 
       - number: 80
         name: http
      - number:
